nasb.text: Ahaz was twenty years old when he became king, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem; and he did not do what was right in the sight of the Lord his God, as his father David had done.

esv.text: Ahaz was twenty years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. And he did not do what was right in the eyes of the Lord his God, as his father David had done,

cnv.text: 亞哈斯登基的時候是二十歲，他在耶路撒冷作王十六年。但是他不像他祖宗大衛行耶和華他的　神看為正的事，

ccb.text: 他二十岁登基，在耶路撒冷统治十六年。他没有效法他祖先大卫做耶和华视为正的事，
